result: **Goal: Add an L-System Plant Growth simulation mode** — a step-by-step procedural plant simulator where branching structures grow from seeds, competing for light. Each tick expands L-system grammar rules to produce fractal trees, ferns, and bushes rendered with Unicode box-drawing and leaf characters. Include presets for different plant species (binary tree, fern, bush, seaweed) and interactive controls for branching angle, growth rate, and light direction. This is visually distinct from all 48 existing modes and brings generative grammar-based growth to the simulation framework.
